title: WashU Law to host Model Constitutional Convention
summary_en: The Washington University in St. Louis School of Law will host a national Model Constitutional Convention May 21–24.
title_cn: 圣路易斯华盛顿大学法学院将主办美国全国模拟制宪会议

title: Dosenbach named inaugural David M. and Tracy S. Holtzman Professor of Neurology
summary_en: Nico Dosenbach, MD, PhD, is internationally recognized for his research in precision brain mapping and discovery of the network within the brain that links cognition with movement.
title_cn: 尼科·U·多森巴赫就任华盛顿大学医学院首任戴维·M·霍尔茨曼与特雷西·S·霍尔茨曼神经病学讲席教授

title: WashU, Sodexo partner with Operation Food Search
summary_en: WashU and Sodexo teamed up to make it easy for students to donate extra meal points to help feed children in the St. Louis area.
title_cn: 华盛顿大学（圣路易斯）联合索迪斯集团与“食物搜寻行动”组织开展公益食品捐赠活动

title: SCOTUS decision could prove catastrophic for minority political power
summary_en: The Supreme Court on April 29 struck down a voting map in Louisiana, creating a path for other states to redraw congressional maps that could affect elections for years. The result may be disastrous for racial minority political power in the United States, says an expert on voting rights law at Washington University in St. Louis.
title_cn: 美国联邦最高法院裁决或对少数族裔政治权力造成灾难性影响

title: Class Act: Ariel Hernandez-Leyva
summary_en: In May, Ariel Hernandez-Leyva is set to achieve his goal of becoming a physician-scientist by earning a medical degree and a PhD in computational and systems biology from WashU Medicine. He is first author on a study — published in the prestigious journal Cell Metabolism — revealing that breath can carry clues to gut microbiome health, particularly among children.
title_cn: 《华盛顿大学医学院科研人员阿里尔·埃尔南德斯-莱瓦科研成长经历及相关研究成果发布》

title: Class Acts: GP Worley
summary_en: GP Worley applied to the WashU Brown School because they were inspired by the work of the Sexuality, Health and Gender (SHAG) Center. Today, Worley is one of the center’s most committed contributors, pursuing multiple projects that explore the role of sexuality and gender in health.
title_cn: 华盛顿大学（圣路易斯）布朗学院学生GP·沃利致力于改善酷儿群体健康成果

title: Class Acts: Catalina Bernabé Correa
summary_en: A passion for motorcycles and a background in neuroscience drove Catalina Bernabé Correa to join the lab of Ismael Seáñez at WashU McKelvey Engineering, where she is studying different neuro-rehabilitation strategies for individuals with spinal cord injuries. Bernabé is set to graduate in May with a bachelor’s degree in biomedical engineering.

title: Speakers planned for schools’ Commencement celebrations
summary_en: Several distinguished speakers, faculty members and student leaders will take part in Commencement recognition ceremonies for Class of 2026 graduates and their families and guests May 12-15 at Washington University in St. Louis.
title_cn: 华盛顿大学（圣路易斯）公布2026届毕业典礼系列活动演讲嘉宾安排

title: Managing Mythos
summary_en: WashU cybersecurity expert Ning Zhang explains the growing capabilities of machine learning models such as Mythos and their threat to internet infrastructure and security.
title_cn: 人工智能企业Anthropic筹备发布克劳德“神话”基础模型 牵头实施“玻璃翼项目”强化网络安全防御

title: Class Acts: Izzy Caffarelli
summary_en: Isabella Caffarelli, a senior majoring in applied mathematics and minoring in astrophysics in Arts & Sciences, is looking forward to a new research challenge after she graduates from WashU: helping brain scientists use advanced algorithms to sort and understand neurological data in a cleaner, more coherent way.
title_cn: 华盛顿大学（圣路易斯）优秀学子伊莎贝拉（伊齐）·卡法雷利将赴美国国立卫生研究院任职
